title: Appeal a rejection
content:
Use this endpoint to appeal the rejection decision, that is, to request for the ad group to be re-evaluated, when your ad group is rejected during review. After the appeal, you need to wait for some time and call the [/adgroup/review_info/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1740554277061634) endpoint to check the appeal status and see if the review status is updated. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/adgroup/appeal/| /v1.3/adgroup/appeal/| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`: number
`adgroup_id`: number
`ad_id`: number|`advertiser_id`: string
`adgroup_id`: string
`ad_id`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/adgroup/appeal/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type{Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`.| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| | advertiser_id {Required} | string | Advertiser ID. | | adgroup_id {Required} | string| Ad group ID. | | ad_id | string | Ad ID. Optional. | | appeal_reason | string | The reason for the appeal. | | attachment_list | string[] | List of attachment links. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "advertiser_id": "ADVERTISER_ID", "adgroup_id": "ADGROUP_ID", "ad_id": "AD_ID", "appeal_reason": "APPEAL_REASON", "attachment_list": [ "ATTACHMENT_LIST" ] }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/adgroup/appeal/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
